name: PhonePe HDFC Bank Ultimo Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Select PhonePe transactions (recharges, utilities, bill payments, and travel)
Select online brands (Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Ajio, Swiggy, Zomato, and Uber)
Other spends (1% via UPI scan & pay)
rewards.displayRate: 1% as Reward Points on other spends

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic lounge access visits per quarter on spending Rs 75,000 or more in the previous calendar quarter

exclusions: Payment of card fees, interest, and charges

joiningBenefitsValued.label: PhonePe gift card worth Rs 499 on first RuPay credit-card-on-UPI transaction of minimum Rs 100 within 30 days of card issuance
Additional scratch cards worth Rs 50 each on next 10 RuPay credit-card-on-UPI transactions of minimum Rs 100

joiningBenefits: PhonePe gift card worth Rs 499 on first RuPay credit-card-on-UPI transaction of minimum Rs 100 within 30 days of card issuance
Additional scratch cards worth Rs 50 each on next 10 RuPay credit-card-on-UPI transactions of minimum Rs 100
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle

selfEmployed: ITR above Rs 26 lakh per annum

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Audited against official HDFC Bank PhonePe Ultimo product page and terms on 2026-06-07.
Lounge access requires spending Rs 75,000 in the previous calendar quarter to unlock next quarter access.
Cashback redemption against statement is 1 Reward Point = Rs 1, minimum 500 points. SmartBuy is 1 Point = Rs 0.30.
1.75% DCC markup fee applies on transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
Fully digital onboarding and application managed through the PhonePe app.
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period.
Zero cost card liability when reported immediately.
